title: Division
summary: Division partitions quantities into equal parts or equal groups.
claim: Division describes partitioning a quantity into equal parts or determining how many equal groups fit within a quantity.
proof: Division is inverse to multiplication: if a × b = c, then c ÷ a = b and c ÷ b = a when the operation is defined.
validation: Level 5 — Mathematical / Logical Proof within arithmetic, subject to defined division conditions.
reconstruction: Can be rediscovered by distributing objects equally into groups.
